utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items required in the final format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Each must include the specified scope and costs. Health coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance with costs — present (details mention physical and mental, monthly_cost provided). Property coverage: home/contents insurance with costs — present (home contents specified, monthly_cost provided). Travel coverage: travel insurance with costs — present (worldwide travel, monthly_cost provided). Additional services: any enhancement services with costs — present (stated none selected, monthly_cost 0). Total budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown — present (monthly_cost and annual_cost provided; also monthly_savings, which is extra but acceptable). Therefore, all items are fully specified according to the required coverage and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three insurance items: HealthFirst Standard Plan (Physical & Mental) under health_coverage, HomeFirst Standard Coverage under property_coverage, and TravelFirst Standard Plan under travel_coverage. I matched each to the ground-truth catalog. For health, the plan name directly matches 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' which appears in both physical_health (rating 7) and mental_health (rating 6). Since the final plan bundles physical & mental into one HealthFirst Standard Plan, I list both corresponding ratings separately under distinct keys to preserve accuracy. For property, 'HomeFirst Standard Coverage' matches exactly with rating 7. For travel, 'TravelFirst Standard Plan' matches exactly with rating 8.
